calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Off Calendar

Req. For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the plaintiff Illuminex Diamonds Corp., a corp.
Order waiving live testimony at the hearing was in the case file.
Default of Defendants Hatton Trading & Sons, Inc., a corp. and Ravin Chatrath as an individual has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants follows:

Damages/Principal - $40967.82
Prejudgment Interest $9899.62
Attorneys' fees - $1000.00
NSF Damages $4500.00
Costs - $630.00.00, for a Total of $56,997.44
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Req. For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
